legal.title: Legal Documents
legal.kvkk_content:
1. Data Controller

In accordance with the Personal Data Protection Law ("KVKK"), as Pruva Logistics Platform ("Platform"), acting as a data controller, we will process your personal data within the scope described below.

2. Purpose of Processing Personal Data

Company title, Tax ID, corporate e-mail, and operational data collected through the Platform are processed to provide services, verify users, manage advertisement and bidding processes, and fulfill legal obligations.

3. Data Transfer and Protection

Your data is shared only to the extent necessary for the performance of the service (with the matching carrier/loader). Our platform applies industry standard encryption and security measures for the safety of your data.

4. Your Rights

You have the right to request deletion of your data, learn whether it is processed, and request correction. You can submit your applications via our corporate e-mail address.
legal.term_content:
IMPORTANT: Pruva Logistics is an "Intermediary Service Provider". It cannot be held directly responsible for any damage, delay, or loss during the transportation process.

1. Responsibilities of Parties

Pruva Logistics: It is only a digital marketplace that brings together the loader (shipper) and carrier. It does not act as an arbitrator in commercial disputes between the parties and does not provide guarantees.

2. Data Accuracy

The user undertakes the accuracy of the Tax ID and company information provided during registration. In case of submitting false or fake documents, the legal responsibility belongs entirely to the user and their account will be permanently closed.

3. Platform Usage

Price quotes and customer information obtained through the platform are considered "Trade Secrets". In case of leaking or misusing this information outside the platform, Pruva Logistics reserves the right to compensation.

4. Limitation of Liability

Pruva Logistics is not responsible for indirect damages that may arise due to system outages, data losses, or force majeure. The platform is provided on an "As-Is" basis.

academy.exw_desc: All responsibility lies with the buyer. The seller only delivers the goods at their premises.
academy.fob_desc: The seller is responsible until the goods are loaded on board the vessel. Freight is borne by the buyer.
academy.cif_desc: The seller pays the main carriage freight and insurance on behalf of the buyer. Risk transfers on board.
academy.ddp_desc: The most convenient term for the buyer. The seller delivers the goods to the buyer's door, including customs duties.

system.title: PRUVA SUPPORT
system.welcome_text: You have successfully registered on Pruva, Turkey's fastest and most reliable digital logistics platform. You are in the right place to streamline your logistics operations, reach the most suitable freight quotes in seconds, and instantly match with reliable business partners!
system.what_can_do: 🚀 What can you do with Pruva?
system.shippers_text: You can create detailed freight listings in seconds, evaluate competitive freight quotes from carriers, and track your cargo's port free time statuses live with our smart alarms.
system.carriers_text: You can instantly bid on hundreds of active shipments in the marketplace, multiply your business volume with our secure agreement infrastructure, and stand out by earning a high performance score.
system.secure_trade_text: In order to maintain Pruva's security and transaction quality, sharing phone numbers, email, or bank/invoice information directly via chats is prohibited. The moment an agreement is reached on the platform, both parties' contact and invoice information will be automatically and securely forwarded to each other by the system.
system.note: 💡 Note: This message is an automated system notification and cannot be replied to. Whenever you need support, you can go to the Help & Support area from the left menu or contact our team at support@pruvahub.com.

rate_sheets.hero_desc: Drag and drop the spot price images (PNG/JPG) you received from shipowners or agencies into the system. Let Pruva AI Vision automatically extract and digitize the price rows.

Our customer is waiting urgently, we'd appreciate if you could send it today.

{{SIGNATURE}}
